title: chilocarpus steenisianus
intro: Chilocarpus steenisianus, also known as the 'Perfume Plant', is a species of evergreen shrub native to the tropical forests of Sri Lanka. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oil, which contains compounds such as camphor, borneol, and linalool, and is used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Chilocarpus steenisianus include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections, such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the leaves and stems of the plant are typically used in infusions, decoctions, and essential oil extractions, often in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
